CMS Chronic Conditions Data Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Master Beneficiary Summary File - Base (with Medicare Part A/B/C/D)
Version - May 2017 (Source: CME)
Short SAS Name1 Long SAS Name2 Label Type Length
BENE_ID BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15
RFRNC_YR BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR Reference Year NUM 4
ENRL_SRC ENRL_SRC Source of enrollment data CHAR 3
SAMPLE_GROUP SAMPLE_GROUP Medicare 1, 5, or 20% strict sample group indicator CHAR 2
EFIVEPCT ENHANCED_FIVE_PERCENT_FLAG Enhanced
